title: All Secure
author: Jack Murphy
subline: One soldier's testimony from the war on terror.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A target reticle — the universal 'operator' symbol. The crosshair and center are RED. The outer ring is ash. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1300)" fill="none">
    <!-- Outer dashed circle -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="380" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 8"/>
    <!-- Inner solid circle -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="240" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Center bullseye -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="40" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Crosshair lines (the + cross) -->
    <line x1="-540" y1="0" x2="-260" y2="0" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="260" y1="0" x2="540" y2="0" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="-540" x2="0" y2="-260" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="260" x2="0" y2="540" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Tick marks at compass points -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1">
      <line x1="0" y1="-380" x2="0" y2="-340"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="380" x2="0" y2="340"/>
      <line x1="-380" y1="0" x2="-340" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="380" y1="0" x2="340" y2="0"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The ALL SECURE whisper in red just below the reticle -->
    <text x="0" y="600" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">SITREP · ALL SECURE</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A red target reticle — the operator's universal sign. The bullseye and crosshairs are red; the outer dashed ring is ash. 360px weight-500 title at the bottom.
